titel: "Moldova's place is within the European Union," said President von der Leyen at the EU summit with Moldova.
html:
European Commission News, Brussels, June 25, 2026.

Commission President Ursula von der Leyen and Prime Minister António Costa welcomed Moldovan President Maia Sandu to Brussels on June 22 for the second EU-Moldova Summit. ...
tldr: European Union leaders are welcoming Moldova closer to potential membership in the union. This is a significant step towards the country becoming part of the European community.
lattlast:
On June 22nd, EU leader Ursula von der Leyen and the Prime Minister of Portugal, António Costa, met with the President of Moldova. They discussed how Moldova can become a member of the EU.

During the meeting, the EU leader stated that Moldova has a place within the union. This means that the country will receive support and become part of European cooperation.

The meeting was important in demonstrating that European countries are committed to helping Moldova progress. This decision represents a significant step forward for the country's future.
